content: {"key_findings": ["Round 2 retrieved AHA 2024 NHANES CV mortality material and broadened the long-term safety base", "Regulatory / FDA / EFSA material partial but sufficient for discussion depth", "Ramadan systematic-review coverage added across Round 2", "GLP-1 head-to-head anchor limited — real RCTs not yet completed in the field"], "perspective_gaps": ["Regional", "Methodological"], "web_queries": ["Ramadan diurnal intermittent fasting cardiovascular pooled meta-analysis", "LMIC South Asia Africa intermittent fasting metabolic syndrome trial"], "academic_queries": ["intermittent fasting long-duration 12 month RCT sustained adherence", "intermittent fasting GRADE risk of bias Cochrane heterogeneity"], "exa_queries": ["intermittent fasting metabolic syndrome LMIC clinical trial"], "convergence_assessment": "narrowing", "should_continue": true, "reasoning": "Round 2 closed major gaps. One more targeted round for Regional and Methodological depth, then converge.", "knowledge_gaps": ["LMIC-specific IF RCTs in metabolic syndrome", "Long-duration pragmatic IF trials beyond 6 months", "Methodological depth on GRADE and risk-of-bias across IF meta-analyses"]}
